refnamediv.refpurpose: Takes as input KML representation of geometry and outputs a PostGIS geometry object

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Constructs a PostGIS ST_Geometry object from the OGC KML representation.
ST_GeomFromKML works only for KML Geometry fragments. It throws an error if you try to use it on a whole KML document.

OGC KML versions supported:
KML 2.2.0 Namespace
OGC KML standards, cf: http://www.opengeospatial.org/standards/kml:

note.para: ST_GeomFromKML function not support SQL/MM curves geometries.

refsection.title: Examples - A single geometry with srsName
